# Product Inventory Report

## Current Stock Levels

Here is our current inventory across all warehouses:

| Product Name | SKU | Quantity | Unit Price | Total Value | Warehouse |
|--------------|-----|----------|------------|-------------|-----------|
| Laptop Pro 15 | LP-001 | 150 | $1,299 | $194,850 | West |
| Desktop Ultra | DU-002 | 85 | $899 | $76,415 | East |
| Tablet Max | TM-003 | 220 | $599 | $131,780 | Central |
| Monitor 27" | MN-004 | 340 | $349 | $118,660 | West |
| Keyboard Pro | KB-005 | 500 | $129 | $64,500 | East |
| Mouse Wireless | MW-006 | 650 | $49 | $31,850 | Central |
| Webcam HD | WC-007 | 280 | $79 | $22,120 | West |
| Headset Premium | HS-008 | 195 | $149 | $29,055 | East |

| Department | Q1 Budget | Q2 Budget | Q3 Budget | Q4 Budget | Total | Percentage |

| Engineering | $450,000 | $480,000 | $510,000 | $540,000 | $1,980,000 | 35% |

## Customer Demographics

Analysis of our customer base:

| Age Group | Count | Percentage | Avg Purchase | Retention Rate | Preferred Channel |
|-----------|-------|------------|--------------|----------------|-------------------|
| 18-24 | 3,200 | 16% | $450 | 65% | Mobile |
| 25-34 | 6,800 | 34% | $750 | 78% | Web |
| 35-44 | 5,400 | 27% | $950 | 82% | Web |
| 45-54 | 3,000 | 15% | $1,200 | 85% | Store |
| 55+ | 1,600 | 8% | $800 | 88% | Store |

The tables above represent various aspects of our business operations and can be visualized in presentation slides.
